channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Garry Trudeau and William F. Buckley Found Common Ground Across Party Lines
item.description: Despite generational and political differences, the two Yale alumni discovered shared values.

item.title: Interior secretary says Iran conflict nearly over, expects major price drop
item.description: Those focused on rising gas prices are missing the broader context of President Trump's conflict with Iran, according to the interior secretary.

item.title: Trump Justice Department escalates conflict with the press
item.description: Subpoenas have been issued regarding coverage of the Iran military campaign.

item.title: Mullin says 'American History X' deterred him before faith transformed his life
item.description: Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin recalls a youthful path toward destruction that was redirected by faith.
